evals.prompt: Search twitter for tweets about AI agents from the last 24 hours with at least 50 likes
evals.expected_output: Returns JSON array of tweets matching 'AI agent' keywords, each with id, text, author, likes >= 50, retweets, views, url fields

evals.prompt: Find me recent tweets about agentic AI and agent frameworks, in English and French, minimum 100 likes and 10 retweets
evals.expected_output: Returns tweets matching 'agentic AI' OR 'agent framework' with lang:en OR lang:fr filter, engagement >= 100 likes and >= 10 retweets

evals.prompt: Get tweets about EU AI Act from the last 48 hours
evals.expected_output: Returns tweets matching 'EU AI Act' with start_time set to 48 hours ago, default engagement thresholds, no replies or retweets

evals.prompt: Search X for Shopify AI product tools, at least 20 likes, last 12 hours, max 10 results
evals.expected_output: Returns max 10 tweets matching Shopify AI keywords, likes >= 20, from last 12 hours

evals.prompt: Check twitter for what people are saying about on-chain AI agents
evals.expected_output: Returns tweets matching 'on-chain agent' or similar crypto AI keywords with default filters applied
